title: Elytra Nerf
description: Makes elytras (slightly) worse (kind of). Build trains.
body:
Only required serverside/singleplayer

- Elytras run out of durability 2x as fast
- Elytras get repaired when you take damage (proportional to the damage you take)
     - Balances out durability change
     - Incentivizes using explosive rockets!
- Elytras decrease magic damage to .85 when worn
- Elytras go slower when not boosting
     - Incentivizes using higher flight duration rockets
- When wearing an elytra you are more end-like (take damage in water/rain)
